name: seafields-daily-digest
description: Daily 00:00 UTC Seafields registration + lot transition summary email to seafields_notify_recipients.

env_vars.name: CRON_SECRET
env_vars.description: Bearer token validating Vercel cron route invocations. Shared with hemp-homes-outreach-evaluate.
env_vars.where: Generate locally and paste into Vercel env

env_vars.name: RESEND_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Resend API for sending the daily digest.

external_setup.title: Vercel cron config — seafields-daily-digest
external_setup.description: Schedule entry in vercel.json at 00:00 UTC daily.
steps: Confirm vercel.json crons array contains: { path: '/api/cron/seafields-daily-digest', schedule: '0 0 * * *' }

external_setup.title: Recipients table populated
external_setup.description: public.seafields_notify_recipients must have at least one active row, otherwise the digest sends to no one.
steps: Check via SQL or the admin: SELECT count(*) FROM seafields_notify_recipients WHERE active = true
